text:
22b(E4bA)Verbally Abusive Behavioral Symptoms: Frequency CHAR 1 Indicates the frequency of the patient's verbally abusive behavior. Other patients or staff were threatened, screamed at, or cursed at. -1 = Unknown, -2 = Space, 0 = Behavior not exhibited in last 7 days, 1 = Behavior of this type occurred 1 to 3 days in last 7 days, 2 = Behavior of this type occurred 4 to 6 days, but less than daily, 3 = Behavior of this type occurred daily
78 E4CA E4CA_PHYS_ABUSIVE 22c(E4cA)Physically Abusive
